% check a.php
a.php:10:1: $b is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:12:11: class const Foo::DOES_NOT_EXIST does not exist
a.php:16:1: $z is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:24:1: $t is of type: string (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	/** @var string */
	const BAR = 'bar', BAZ = 'baz';
}

$b = Foo::BAR;
#debugType $b

$b = Foo::DOES_NOT_EXIST;
$c = Foo::class;

$z = Foo::BAZ;
#debugType $z

class Bar
{
	const string TYPED = 'hello';
}

$t = Bar::TYPED;
#debugType $t
